text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is set to face off against Eishin Flash in
the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only the best of the best gather for this Grand
Prix race. One cannot even hope to seize victory
without training hard for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I psyche myself up as I head for the trainer's
office, only to be distracted by the sound of
laughter in an all-too-familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh-hohoho!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The essential element to being the best
Umamusume of all is simple. And that is:
overwhelming beauty!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why, with my incomparable loveliness,
dominating Paris Fashion Week would be but a
trifle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh-hohoho! Ohhh-hohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I race after Gold Ship with all my might.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Beauty! Beauty! Beauty!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Beaaauuuty!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There, now that's what I call aesthetics! I'll have
the whole world ensnared in no ti―
What lofty dreams you have.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whozzat?

However, it would behoove you to save the
"ensnaring the world" talk until you can best me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, 'tis I! The living embodiment of beauty!
The chosen child graced with heavenly light!
None other than T―

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Guh! How dare you rob me of my grand
introduction!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It seems it would also behoove me not to
underestimate you, Golshi.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very well! Let us settle this matter once and for
all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Today we shall establish whose beauty is superior,
and upon whom the matron goddess of our art
most favorably smiles!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sounds great! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Get ready to be awed by the power of my
sandpaper-polished beauty!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, get over here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You be the judge of this beauty contest. And
you'd better cast your vote fairly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Gold Ship's... very firm suggestion, I
find myself serving as arbiter of their battle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so it begins...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right, let's see you try to act out this! A weeping willow dancing in the breeze atop a hill!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Fssshhh... Well?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Th-that wasn't half bad!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, allow me to issue your challenge. White
feathers dancing down from the heavens!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Fwahhh... What do you think?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Perfect, as expected.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm just getting started. I'm only using a
quarter of my strength right now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmph! As am I! Now, what is my next challenge?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A largish clam!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A lonely rose blooming in twilight!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A stalk of seaweed living in the modern world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A flash of azure lightning from beyond the clouds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The heated battle carries on...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we've been at it for four hours...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Yet no clear victor has emerged...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Loath as I am to admit it, it seems I have no
choice but to acknowledge your prowess.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I was just thinking the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your power level is a match for mine! You are a
worthy opponent!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we should do this again sometime! Then we
can settle this once and for all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have it any other way! Victory shall be
mine in our next battle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, their competition ends without me having
to say a word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship vs. T.M. Opera O: draw! (To be
continued...)
